validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: npx vitest run --project api apps/api/src/modules/ticket/__tests__/ticket.router.test.ts && npx vitest run --project root packages/validators/src/__tests__/ticket.test.ts

definition_of_done_items.criterion: close endpoint - close ticket with status transition guard
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 4 tests: close OPEN, close IN_PROGRESS, reject CLOSED, reject non-existent

definition_of_done_items.criterion: escalate endpoint - escalate priority to CRITICAL with guards
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 5 tests: escalate MEDIUM, with reason, reject CRITICAL, reject CLOSED, reject non-existent

definition_of_done_items.criterion: assign endpoint - assign/reassign ticket to agent
getSLAStatus endpoint - return SLA tracking fields
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 3 tests: return SLA status, return breach data, reject non-existent

definition_of_done_items.criterion: getByCustomer endpoint - list tickets by customer with pagination
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 4 tests: return tickets, empty list, pagination offset, tenant isolation

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Input validation via Zod schemas for all 5 new endpoints
definition_of_done_items.evidence: 22 validator tests: closeTicketSchema(3), escalateTicketSchema(4), assignTicketSchema(3), getSLAStatusSchema(3), getByCustomerSchema(7)
All 5 new endpoints use tenantProcedure, getByCustomer passes tenantId to service

definition_of_done_items.criterion: No regression in existing 26 router tests
No regression in existing 64 validator tests
Architecture compliance - API layer imports only from validators
definition_of_done_items.evidence: Router imports from @intelliflow/validators/ticket, no direct domain/adapter imports

invariants_acknowledged: All endpoints must use tenantProcedure for multi-tenant isolation
Validators derive from domain constants (DRY pattern)
Architecture: API layer cannot import from domain/adapters directly
All Zod schemas validated at API boundary before service calls

notes: IFC-189: Added 5 new tRPC endpoints to ticket router (close, escalate, assign, getSLAStatus, getByCustomer) with 5 Zod validator schemas, 22 validator tests, and 19 router tests. Updated TicketService.findMany with contactId filter for customer portal queries. All 131 ticket-related tests pass (86 validator + 45 router). Coverage: ticket.router.ts 98.47%, ticket.ts 100%. No regressions.
